author: Besting
text: REVISED 2026-06-06: (1) tracker is a SEEDED plugin in the landing list (from default-config/), not a magic default. (2) Implicit founding is FINE: bare prime create+push to a resolvable remote; --stealth opts out; push-fail (no perms) -> silent stealth-local fallback. (3) Silent-empty mitigation = tracker WARNING (diagnostic, not authority): prime fetches origin:balls/config anyway; if landing tasks_branch is still the SEEDED DEFAULT (not user-set, not stealth) AND the synced config names a different store, warn 'run bl install / prime --install'. spec bl-2e26 §12/§16.

author: Adware
text: doctor SUBTRACTED ENTIRELY (bl-77a7; code bl-a38e). STRIKE the 'doctor hook: audit tasks_branch remote reachable / clone healthy / stale-beyond-TTL' bullet and the '§16' ref in note (3) — the tracker builds NO doctor hook. Remote unreachability/staleness now surfaces at point-of-use (sync/pre errors, the bl-cd21 contention exit). Rest of scope (sync tasks_branch<->remote ff-only, prime resolves remote, drop trail-walk) UNAFFECTED.

author: Fierceness
text: Pointer/trail-walk removal ALREADY LANDED under bl-9329 (commit a9b476b, 2026-06-07): src/tracker/pointer.rs deleted, prime::prime resolves upstream as b.remote.clone() directly, committed-pointer test + set_pointer fixture gone. So this ball's 'Drop trail-walk handling and the origin->central discovery' bullet is DONE — do not redo. Remaining scope is additive: remote-resolution PRECEDENCE (--remote > --center > XDG > origin; today only origin via checkout::origin_of), the seeded-default-mismatch WARNING, and push-fail -> silent stealth-local fallback. bl-9329 archived, so this is now unblocked. New sibling bl-6e93 (prime --install) deps on this.
